description_long: This gatehouse features a robust stone and brick construction with a prominent arched passageway at its center, flanked by thick, squared pillars. The upper surface is a wooden deck, bordered by stone parapets, giving it a fortified appearance. The stonework is detailed with alternating light and dark blocks, and the archway is reinforced with darker stone trim. Decorative metal bands and spikes are visible along the lower sections, suggesting defensive intent. The structure is solid and imposing, with no visible windows and only a single, large arched entryway. The overall design evokes a medieval or fantasy architectural style, suitable for guarding an entrance to a walled city or castle.
description: A fortified stone and brick gatehouse with a wooden deck, arched entryway, and defensive metal accents, evoking a medieval style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large arched entryway, stone pillars, and decorative metal bands on the lower facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, stone parapets, and the solid, windowless wall structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with another arched passageway and similar stone and metal detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden deck and stone parapets, with no visible entry or windows.
attribute_entryway_design: large arched stone entryway with reinforced trim
